reasoning: Based on retrospective reports from December 2025 and early 2026, xAI did not have the top AI model on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard on December 31, 2025. According to multiple sources, Google's Gemini 3 Pro held the #1 spot on the LMArena Text Arena during late December 2025, with ratings stabilizing around this model into January 2026. OpenAI's GPT-5.2 and Anthropic's Claude 4.5/4.6 were the other top contenders, with Claude later overtaking the #1 spot in 2026. Meanwhile, xAI's best-performing model at the time (Grok 4.1 Thinking) was ranked #3, and the company was described as the "third force" in the AI landscape. Furthermore, the market's resolution criteria stipulate that in the event of a tie, the company name appearing first alphabetically wins. Since "Anthropic", "Google", and "OpenAI" all precede "xAI", xAI would lose any tie-breaker. Given these facts, the probability is set to the lowest allowed boundary (2%).
